title: SkillSelectorOutput
description: Stage 3a output: per-subtask primary/runner-up selections with model tier and cost estimates.

subtask_id.description: Must match a subtask id from DecomposerOutput

primary_skill.description: Skill id from the candidate list. Null only when no candidate fits — surface as catalog gap.

runner_up.description: Second-best candidate. Null when there's exactly one viable choice or no candidate fits.

model_tier.description: Cognitive load tier. Default sonnet; haiku for mechanical; opus only for genuinely hard.

reasoning.description: One sentence: why primary, why runner-up. Names the trade-off.
